data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Priority booking (members book before public)', but the evidence does not confirm this functionality. The linked use case indicates that members have a 7-day advance booking window compared to 3 days for non-members, but there is no explicit evidence showing that members can book before the public. This indicates a gap in the requirement coverage.
gaps: No evidence confirming that members can book before public bookings open.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
